segments.text: Moreover the spirit lifted me up, and brought me unto the east gate of the LORD's house, which looketh eastward: and behold at the door of the gate five and twenty men; among whom I saw Jaazaniah the son of Azur, and Pelatiah the son of Benaiah, princes of the people.
these are the men that devise mischief, and give wicked counsel in this city
segments.speaker: Divine Being

segments.text: It is not near; let us build houses: this city is the caldron, and we be the flesh
segments.speaker: Princes of the People

footnotes: It is not for us to build houses near

segments.text: prophesy against them, prophesy, O son of man
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And the Spirit of the LORD fell upon me
Speak; Thus saith the LORD; Thus have ye said, O house of Israel: for I know the things that come into your mind, every one of them
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Ye have multiplied your slain in this city, and ye have filled the streets thereof with the slain
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Your slain whom ye have laid in the midst of it, they are the flesh, and this city is the caldron: but I will bring you forth out of the midst of it
segments.speaker: The Lord GOD

segments.text: Ye have feared the sword; and I will bring a sword upon you
segments.speaker: The Lord GOD

segments.text: I will bring you out of the midst thereof, and deliver you into the hands of strangers, and will execute judgments among you
segments.speaker: The Lord GOD

segments.text: Ye shall fall by the sword; I will judge you in the border of Israel; and ye shall know that I am the LORD
segments.speaker: The Lord GOD

segments.text: This city shall not be your caldron, neither shall ye be the flesh in the midst thereof; but I will judge you in the border of Israel
segments.speaker: The Lord GOD

segments.text: ye shall know that I am the LORD: for ye have not walked in my statutes, neither executed my judgments, but have done after the manners of the heathen that are round about you
segments.speaker: The Lord GOD

segments.text: And it came to pass, when I prophesied, that Pelatiah the son of Benaiah died
Ah Lord GOD! wilt thou make a full end of the remnant of Israel?
segments.speaker: Ezekiel

segments.text: the word of the LORD came unto me, saying
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Son of man, thy brethren, even thy brethren, the men of thy kindred, and all the house of Israel wholly, are they unto whom the inhabitants of Jerusalem have said, Get you far from the LORD: unto us is this land given in possession
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Although I have cast them far off among the heathen, and although I have scattered them among the countries, yet will I be to them as a little sanctuary in the countries where they shall come
segments.speaker: The Lord GOD

segments.text: I will even gather you from the people, and assemble you out of the countries where ye have been scattered, and I will give you the land of Israel
segments.speaker: The Lord GOD

segments.text: they shall come thither, and they shall take away all the detestable things thereof and all the abominations thereof from thence
segments.speaker: The Lord GOD

segments.text: I will give them one heart, and I will put a new spirit within you; and I will take the stony heart out of their flesh, and will give them an heart of flesh
segments.speaker: The Lord GOD

segments.text: That they may walk in my statutes, and keep mine ordinances, and do them: and they shall be my people, and I will be their God
segments.speaker: The Lord GOD

segments.text: But as for them whose heart walketh after the heart of their detestable things and their abominations, I will recompense their way upon their own heads
segments.speaker: The Lord GOD

segments.text: Then did the cherubims lift up their wings, and the wheels beside them; and the glory of the God of Israel was over them above
And the glory of the LORD went up from the midst of the city, and stood upon the mountain which is on the east side of the city
Afterwards the spirit took me up, and brought me in a vision by the Spirit of God into Chaldea, to them of the captivity. So the vision that I had seen went up from me
Then I spake unto them of the captivity all the things that the LORD had shewed me
